2603.25741.title: Vega: Learning to Drive with Natural Language Instructions
2603.25741.paper_summary: Vision-language-action models have reshaped autonomous driving to incorporate languages into the decision-making process. However, most existing pipelines only utilize the language modality for scene descriptions or reasoning and lack the flexibility to follow diverse user instructions for personalized driving. To address this, we first construct a large-scale driving dataset (InstructScene) containing around 100,000 scenes annotated with diverse driving instructions with the corresponding trajectories. We then propose a unified Vision-Language-World-Action model, Vega, for instruction-based generation and planning. We employ the autoregressive paradigm to process visual inputs (vision) and language instructions (language) and the diffusion paradigm to generate future predictions (world modeling) and trajectories (action). We perform joint attention to enable interactions between the modalities and use individual projection layers for different modalities for more capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method not only achieves superior planning performance but also exhibits strong instruction-following abilities, paving the way for more intelligent and personalized driving systems.
2603.25741.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動模型已經重新塑造了自動駕駛，將語言納入決策過程中。<lb/>然而，大多數現有的流程僅利用語言模態進行場景描述或推理，缺乏根據多樣化用戶指令進行個性化駕駛的靈活性。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們首先構建了一個大規模的駕駛數據集（InstructScene），其中包含約100,000個場景，並附有多樣化的駕駛指令及相應的軌跡。<lb/>然後，我們提出了一個統一的視覺-語言-世界-行動模型Vega，用於基於指令的生成和規劃。<lb/>我們採用自回歸範式來處理視覺輸入（視覺）和語言指令（語言），並使用擴散範式來生成未來預測（世界建模）和軌跡（行動）。<lb/>我們執行聯合注意力以促進模態之間的互動，並為不同模態使用單獨的投影層以增強能力。<lb/>大量實驗表明，我們的方法不僅實現了卓越的規劃性能，還展現了強大的指令跟隨能力，為更智能和個性化的駕駛系統鋪平了道路。
2603.25741.author: Sicheng Zuo et.al.
2603.25741.authors: Sicheng Zuo, Yuxuan Li, Wenzhao Zheng, Zheng Zhu, Jie Zhou, Jiwen Lu
